note: CBL-B, TCR-signalling brake E3 ligase. Intense recent IO discovery: 566 potent ligands, best pChEMBL 9.52; clinical CBL-B inhibitors. 27 PDB (24 X-ray). KNOWN TCR brake.
T-cell surface scavenger receptor (ALCAM ligand). Itolizumab (anti-CD6 mAb) APPROVED (psoriasis). KNOWN immune biology. SRCR ectodomain; 1 PDB (5A2E).
Type-I interferon receptor chain. Anifrolumab (anti-IFNAR1 mAb) APPROVED for SLE. KNOWN biology. FN3/Ig ectodomain; 5 X-ray PDB.
4-1BB/CD137. Agonist antibodies in oncology (urelumab, utomilumab). KNOWN biology. Cys-rich TNFR ectodomain; 14 PDB X-ray.
CLIC-like chloride channel, ER membrane. Channel class is druggable but this one poorly characterized; no ligand, no PDB (AF only, pLDDT 60).
BAH-domain chromatin reader, heterochromatin silencing. Reader pockets hard but precedented. No ligand, no PDB, partly disordered (pLDDT 50).
Integrator/PP2A phosphatase-module scaffold, VWA domain. PPI target. No potent ligand; PDBs are complex cryo-EM.
PHD finger + HAT-associated (HBO1 complex); also ubiquitin ligase activity. No ligand, no PDB (AF only, pLDDT 62).
Rho-family GTPase, hematopoietic-restricted. Classically hard; nucleotide + PPI inhibitors exist (2 potent ligands, best pChEMBL 7.2). 4 X-ray PDB.
3'-5' exonuclease, metal-dependent hydrolase active site - catalytic pocket exists but no chemical matter, no PDB (AF only, pLDDT 59).
tRNA-modifying transferase with ATP/DMAPP substrate pocket - druggable class in principle, but no chemical matter and no PDB (AF only, pLDDT 85).
PTIP: BRCT-domain scaffold in HMT & DNA-damage complexes. PPI-only, largely disordered (1069 aa). No ligand; 1 BRCT PDB (3SQD).
Core spliceosome U2 B'' protein, tandem RRMs. RNA-binding surfaces poorly ligandable. 1 spurious potent hit; PDBs are spliceosome complexes.
Actin monomer sequestration, cytoskeletal. ADF-H fold, actin interface. No ligand, single PDB (7CCC).
Beta-grasp UBL fold; protein tag/sulfur carrier. No catalytic pocket of its own; enzymology sits on partners (MOCS3). No ligand, no PDB.
